title: Fadeno Review Report
description: The structured judgment artifact an evaluator/reviewer produces. Gate conditions such as no_blocking_issues are computed deterministically from this file (issues filtered to severity == blocking), so a hook, a CI check, or a future runtime can evaluate the gate without re-asking a model.

target.description: What was reviewed (artifact name, file, diff, etc.).

verdict.description: Overall recommendation. The gate should rely on the issues list, not this field alone.
